transactions.description: New York Yankees activated 3B Amed Rosario from the paternity list.
New York Yankees sent LF Jasson Domínguez on a rehab assignment to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees placed RF Aaron Judge on the 10-day injured list retroactive to June 2, 2026. Right rib stress fracture.
New York Yankees optioned C J.C. Escarra to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees recalled RF Spencer Jones from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees placed C Austin Wells on the 10-day injured list. Cervical headaches.
New York Yankees selected the contract of C Ali Sánchez from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees recalled C J.C. Escarra from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
